appName.message: LarkSnap · Doc Export · Web Clipper · Snapshot
appName.description: Extension name (management page and icon hover title)

appDesc.message: Export Feishu/Lark docs to Markdown/PDF/HTML with attachments, and write Markdown back; turn any page (incl. Xiaohongshu) into Markdown, full-page screenshot, AI summary, unlock copy, copy links; download videos from Bilibili, YouTube, Douyin & TikTok.

cmdPageMd.message: Convert current page to Markdown and copy
